text: The atmosphere is contemplative as the gathering dissolves and people slowly depart. There’s a sense of gentle closure, the energy shifting from collective focus to personal reflection. Now, moving through the exhibit and seeing words, inventions, and the play of light and color on the wall, I feel both a small sadness at endings and a curiosity about ongoing creation. Each end is just another beginning—the museum reminds me of this. I feel quietly grateful to have been here.
